name: Asana
description: Manage tasks, projects, and workspaces in Asana. Create and update tasks, search across projects, and track team work through AI chat.
user_auth_instructions: Click 'Connect' to sign in with your Asana account and authorize access.
setup_notes:
Uses Asana's official MCP V2 server (Streamable HTTP).

Setup:
1. Configure your MCP client to connect to:
   https://mcp.asana.com/v2/mcp
2. When prompted, sign in with your Asana account
3. Authorize access to your Asana workspace

Note: The V1/beta endpoint (mcp.asana.com/sse) is deprecated
and will shut down on May 11, 2026.
